item.title: Ford Motor Company: SUSPENSION:REAR:SHOCK ABSORBER Recall (2024 ford bronco)
item.summary: Ford Motor Company (Ford) is recalling certain 2021-2024 Bronco vehicles. The rear shock absorbers may corrode and fail, resulting in detachment of the external reservoir.
item.affectedPeople: An external reservoir that detaches from a vehicle can create a road hazard, increasing the risk of a crash.
item.remedy: Dealers will replace the rear shock absorbers, as necessary free of charge. Owner notification letters were mailed August 15, 2025. Owners may contact Ford customer service at 1-866-436-7332. Ford's number for this recall is 25S01.
item.payoutAmount: Free repair, remedy, software update, or dealer service if stated by the NHTSA recall
